articles.title: 3 dead in New Mexico and first responders treated for exposure to unknown substance, officials say
articles.description:
New Mexico State Police say three of the four people who were found unresponsive inside the home have died and the other is being treated at a hospital in Albuquerque.

The post 3 dead in New Mexico and first responders treated for exposure to unknown substance, officials say appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Three people found unresponsive in New Mexico have died, raising safety concerns.
One individual remains hospitalized in Albuquerque for treatment.
First responders experienced exposure, highlighting risks for emergency personnel.

articles.title: Meta lays off 8,000 employees, as AI casualties mount
articles.description:
Employees have signed petitions against being tracked by AI and were trying to figure out who had been let go on Wednesday, as the Silicon Valley giant tries to transform into an AI-first company.

The post Meta lays off 8,000 employees, as AI casualties mount appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Meta laid off 8,000 employees as part of its AI transformation strategy.
Boston employees are among those affected, facing uncertainty and tracking concerns.
Local job market may tighten as tech layoffs continue to rise in the area.

articles.title: ‘The Mandalorian and Grogu’ review: A light, low-stakes ‘Star Wars’ movie
articles.description:
“The Mandalorian and Grogu” eschews the vast scale of the original "Star Wars" trilogy, but still goes beyond the small-scale storytelling of the Disney+ series.

The post ‘The Mandalorian and Grogu’ review: A light, low-stakes ‘Star Wars’ movie appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: The Mandalorian and Grogu offers a lighter take on the Star Wars franchise.
Boston theaters will screen the film starting May 20, 2026.
Local fans can enjoy a new cinematic experience without the usual high stakes.

articles.title: Patriots’ Craig Woodson is eager to build on strong rookie season ‘I’ve got to prove myself again’
articles.description:
"I can do what I know I can do, so I've just got to trust myself."

The post Patriots’ Craig Woodson is eager to build on strong rookie season ‘I’ve got to prove myself again’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots' Craig Woodson aims to improve after a strong rookie season in 2023.
Woodson emphasizes the need to prove himself again to the team and fans.
His performance could significantly influence the Patriots' defensive strategy this season.

articles.title: US announces charges against former Cuban leader Raúl Castro in 1996 aircraft shootdown
articles.description:
The indictment was related to Castro’s alleged role in the shootdown of two small planes operated by the exile group Brothers to the Rescue. Castro, now 94, was Cuba's defense minister at the time.

The post US announces charges against former Cuban leader Raúl Castro in 1996 aircraft shootdown appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: US charges Raúl Castro for his alleged role in 1996 aircraft shootdown.
Two planes operated by Brothers to the Rescue were shot down, killing four.
Boston's Cuban-American community may see renewed discussions on U.S.-Cuba relations.

You'll find them in Vermont and Maine.

Boston residents may explore nearby welcoming destinations for weekend getaways.

articles.title: Amtrak is expanding Berkshire Flyer service this summer
articles.description:
Service begins on June 12.

summary: Amtrak expands Berkshire Flyer service starting June 12, enhancing travel options for Boston residents.

Local tourism expected to boost as more visitors travel from Boston to the Berkshires.
